items.title: fix(model-auth): resolve per-entry apiKey profile references
items.summary: fix(model-auth): resolve per-entry apiKey profile references Fixes #67423. Resolve provider-entry apiKey fields that intentionally reference model auth profiles through centralized binding logic, so runtime auth and status labeling agree. Preserve env-first precedence, SecretRef handling, provider/baseUrl compatibility checks, and model auth-mode guards. Verification: - node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-auth.profiles.test.ts src/agents/model-auth-label.test.ts - PATH=/tmp/openclaw-corepack-shim.XXXXXX:$PATH CI=true pnpm check:changed - .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main - GitHub CI run 26710260760 and related CodeQL/proof checks on f55dec154d57229fa02a068bd73f202cee4d0b23 Co-authored-by: kinjitakabe

items.title: 駭客假借提供常見系統工具、濫用AI聊天機器人接觸受害者，意圖發動挖礦攻擊
items.summary: 在過往挖礦軟體攻擊當中，駭客可能選擇透過搜尋引擎最佳化中毒（SEO Poisoning）來接觸目標，盡可能地讓更多使用者上當，讓挖礦活動的收益最大化，不過有人採取更為細緻的方法過濾用戶，試圖接觸擁有更多GPU運算能力的電腦。
